property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11.0.10\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\Downloads\jdk-24_windows-x64_bin\jdk-24.0.1\bin;C:\flutter\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%MAVEN_HOME%\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Local\Programs\Kiro\bin;C:\Users\surya.prakash\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: createUser_duplicateEmail_throwsDuplicateUserException
testcase.system-out: 19:45:25.498 [main] INFO com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Creating user with username: jdoe, email: jdoe@example.com, roles: [EMPLOYEE] 19:45:25.499 [main] ERROR com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Error creating user: Email already exists: jdoe@example.com com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException: Email already exists: jdoe@example.com at com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException.forEmail(DuplicateUserException.java:14) at com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService.createUser(UserService.java:81) at com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserServiceTest$DuplicateUserRejection.lambda$createUser_duplicateEmail_throwsDuplicateUserException$1(UserServiceTest.java:97) at org.assertj.core.api.ThrowableAssert.catchThrowable(ThrowableAssert.java:63) at org.assertj.core.api.AssertionsForClassTypes.catchThrowable(AssertionsForClassTypes.java:892) at testcase.name: createUser_duplicateUsername_throwsDuplicateUserException
testcase.system-out: 19:45:25.515 [main] INFO com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Creating user with username: jdoe, email: jdoe@example.com, roles: [EMPLOYEE] 19:45:25.515 [main] ERROR com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Error creating user: Username already exists: jdoe com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException: Username already exists: jdoe at com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException.forUsername(DuplicateUserException.java:10) at com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService.createUser(UserService.java:76) at com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserServiceTest$DuplicateUserRejection.lambda$createUser_duplicateUsername_throwsDuplicateUserException$0(UserServiceTest.java:83) at org.assertj.core.api.ThrowableAssert.catchThrowable(ThrowableAssert.java:63) at org.assertj.core.api.AssertionsForClassTypes.catchThrowable(AssertionsForClassTypes.java:892) at testcase.name: createUser_uniqueCredentials_savesUser
testcase.system-out: 19:45:25.527 [main] INFO com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Creating user with username: jdoe, email: jdoe@example.com, roles: [EMPLOYEE] 19:45:25.531 [main] INFO com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Created user account: username=jdoe, email=jdoe@example.com, departmentId=null 19:45:25.532 [main] WARN com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Failed to initialize leave balances for user jdoe: Cannot invoke "com.tns.leavemgmt.service.LeaveBalanceService.initializeBalancesForNewUser(com.tns.leavemgmt.entity.User)" because "this.leaveBalanceService" is null

testcase.name: createUser_duplicateUsername_doesNotCheckEmail
testcase.system-out: 19:45:25.549 [main] INFO com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Creating user with username: jdoe, email: jdoe@example.com, roles: [EMPLOYEE] 19:45:25.549 [main] ERROR com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService -- Error creating user: Username already exists: jdoe com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException: Username already exists: jdoe at com.tns.leavemgmt.exception.DuplicateUserException.forUsername(DuplicateUserException.java:10) at com.tns.leavemgmt.user.service.UserService.createUser(UserService.java:76) at
